notes: New 📋 Operations board in the sidebar — one live digest of everything running in the background so nothing you set in motion gets forgotten. It lists your fleet's missions, convoys and ships under construction, pirate mandates, your active escort or smuggling run, a letter of marque, and crews standing by / inbound / following — each with a cycle countdown that clicks through to the right tab. Your active ✨ Fortunes (with clear buttons) and 📡 signals now live here too, consolidated from the Ship panel. Combat and detention show at the top when urgent.
